results.pred_sql: SQLQuery: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM "users"

SQLQuery: 
SELECT COUNT(*) 
FROM "products" 
WHERE "is_visible" = true AND "status" = 'active'
SQLQuery: SELECT "code" FROM currencies LIMIT 5

SQLQuery: 
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT "order_id") 
FROM "returns" 
WHERE "refunded_at" IS NOT NULL

SELECT AVG("grand_total") AS average_grand_total
FROM "orders"

SQLQuery: 
SELECT COUNT(*) 
FROM support.tickets 
WHERE "priority" = 'urgent'

SQLQuery: 
SELECT DISTINCT "status" 
FROM "orders" 
LIMIT 5

SQLQuery: 
SELECT SUM("amount") 
FROM "payments" 
WHERE "status" = 'captured'

SELECT COUNT(*) AS "archived_products_count"
FROM "products"
WHERE "deleted_at" IS NOT NULL

SQLQuery: 
SELECT COUNT(*) 
FROM subscriptions 
WHERE "status" = 'active'

SELECT COUNT(*) AS "country_count"
FROM "countries"
WHERE "continent" = 'Europe'

SQLQuery: 
SELECT AVG("employee_count") AS average_employee_count
FROM accounts
SELECT COUNT(*) AS "sign_ups_count" FROM "users"

SQLQuery: 
SELECT COUNT(*) 
FROM support.tickets 
WHERE "status" != 'closed'

SELECT COUNT(*) AS "overdue_invoices_count"
FROM "invoices"
WHERE "due_at" < CURRENT_DATE AND "status" != 'paid'

SQLQuery: 
SELECT p."name" AS product_name, b."name" AS brand_name
FROM products p
LEFT JOIN brands b ON p."brand_id" = b."id"
LIMIT 5

SQLQuery: 
SELECT 
    "product_reviews"."title" AS "Review Title", 
    "products"."name" AS "Product Name"
FROM 
    "product_reviews"
JOIN 
    "products" ON "product_reviews"."product_id" = "products"."id"
LIMIT 5

SQLQuery: 
SELECT 
    "subscriptions"."id" AS "subscription_id", 
    "plans"."name" AS "plan_name"
FROM 
    "subscriptions"
JOIN 
    "plans" ON "subscriptions"."plan_id" = "plans"."id"
LIMIT 5

SQLQuery: 
SELECT "orders"."order_number", "users"."email"
FROM "orders"
JOIN "users" ON "orders"."user_id" = "users"."id"
LIMIT 5

SELECT 
    "products"."name"
FROM 
    "products"
LEFT JOIN 
    "product_reviews" ON "products"."id" = "product_reviews"."product_id"
WHERE 
    "product_reviews"."id" IS NULL
LIMIT 5

SELECT COUNT(*) AS active_subscribers
FROM subscriptions
JOIN plans ON subscriptions.plan_id = plans.id
WHERE plans.name = 'pro' AND subscriptions.status = 'active'

SQLQuery: 
SELECT "currency_code", SUM("grand_total") AS total_revenue
FROM "orders"
GROUP BY "currency_code"
LIMIT 5

SQLQuery: 
SELECT "tenant_id", COUNT("id") AS "order_count"
FROM "orders"
GROUP BY "tenant_id"
LIMIT 5

SELECT 
    "p"."name", 
    AVG("pr"."rating") AS "average_rating"
FROM 
    "product_reviews" AS "pr"
JOIN 
    "products" AS "p" ON "pr"."product_id" = "p"."id"
GROUP BY 
    "p"."name"
HAVING 
    AVG("pr"."rating") > 4
LIMIT 5

SELECT "user_id", COUNT("id") AS "order_count"
FROM "orders"
GROUP BY "user_id"
HAVING COUNT("id") > 3
LIMIT 5

SELECT 
    "addresses"."country_id",
    SUM("orders"."grand_total") AS total_revenue
FROM 
    "orders"
JOIN 
    "addresses" ON "orders"."shipping_address_id" = "addresses"."id"
GROUP BY 
    "addresses"."country_id"
LIMIT 5

SQLQuery: 
SELECT "p"."name", SUM("oi"."quantity") AS "total_units_sold"
FROM "order_items" AS "oi"
JOIN "products" AS "p" ON "oi"."product_variant_id" = "p"."id"
GROUP BY "p"."name"
ORDER BY "total_units_sold" DESC
LIMIT 5

SELECT DISTINCT "users"."email"
FROM "users"
JOIN "payment_refunds" ON "users"."id" = "payment_refunds"."payment_id"
LIMIT 5

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT "orders"."user_id") AS "user_count"
FROM "orders"
LEFT JOIN "addresses" AS "billing_address" ON "orders"."billing_address_id" = "billing_address"."id"
LEFT JOIN "addresses" AS "shipping_address" ON "orders"."shipping_address_id" = "shipping_address"."id"
LEFT JOIN "countries" AS "billing_country" ON "billing_address"."country_id" = "billing_country"."id"
LEFT JOIN "countries" AS "shipping_country" ON "shipping_address"."country_id" = "shipping_country"."id"
WHERE "billing_country"."name" = 'Germany' OR "shipping_country"."name" = 'Germany'

SELECT 
    "plans"."code" AS "plan_code", 
    COUNT("subscriptions"."id") AS "active_subscriptions_count"
FROM 
    "subscriptions"
JOIN 
    "plans" ON "subscriptions"."plan_id" = "plans"."id"
WHERE 
    "subscriptions"."status" = 'active'
GROUP BY 
    "plans"."code"
LIMIT 5

SELECT 
    DATE_TRUNC('month', "created_at") AS "month",
    COUNT(*) AS "order_count"
FROM 
    orders
WHERE 
    "created_at" >= (CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '12 months')
GROUP BY 
    "month"
ORDER BY 
    "month" DESC
LIMIT 12

SQLQuery: 
SELECT "tenant_id", SUM("grand_total") AS total_revenue
FROM "orders"
GROUP BY "tenant_id"
ORDER BY total_revenue DESC
LIMIT 5

SELECT AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM ("resolved_at" - "created_at")) / 86400) AS average_days_to_resolve
FROM support.tickets
WHERE "resolved_at" IS NOT NULL

SELECT COUNT(*) AS "order_count"
FROM "orders" o
JOIN "users" u ON o."user_id" = u."id"
WHERE o."tenant_id" = u."tenant_id"

SQLQuery: 
SELECT "c"."name", COUNT("pc"."product_id") AS "product_count"
FROM "categories" AS "c"
JOIN "product_categories" AS "pc" ON "c"."id" = "pc"."category_id"
GROUP BY "c"."name"
ORDER BY "product_count" DESC
LIMIT 3

SELECT SUM("grand_total") AS total_revenue_eur
FROM "orders"
WHERE "currency_code" = 'EUR'

SQLQuery: 
SELECT 
    COUNT("cancelled_at")::float / COUNT(*) AS cancellation_fraction
FROM 
    orders

SELECT "name", "employee_count"
FROM accounts
WHERE "employee_count" > 100
LIMIT 5

SELECT 
    "plans"."name" AS "plan_name",
    AVG("orders"."grand_total") AS "average_order_value"
FROM 
    "orders"
JOIN 
    "subscriptions" ON "orders"."user_id" = "subscriptions"."user_id"
JOIN 
    "plans" ON "subscriptions"."plan_id" = "plans"."id"
GROUP BY 
    "plans"."name"
LIMIT 5

SQLQuery: 
SELECT "status", COUNT(*) AS "count"
FROM "invoices"
WHERE "paid_at" IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY "status"
LIMIT 5
